experience_summary: 7 years building backend systems for fintech and SaaS
summary: Senior backend engineer with 7 years of experience shipping distributed systems in regulated environments. Delivered measurable reliability and cost improvements across payment processing and internal platform services. Strong ownership in architecture, incident response, and cross-team execution.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullets: Reduced p95 API latency by 37% for 2.4M monthly payment requests by redesigning idempotency and retry flows in Go.
Cut annual infrastructure spend by $180K by migrating 14 high-traffic services to right-sized autoscaling policies on AWS.
Improved production incident MTTR by 42% across a 9-engineer team by introducing runbooks, SLO dashboards, and alert tuning.

projects.name: Transaction Replay Simulator
bullets: Built a replay simulation harness that validated 11 failure scenarios and prevented 3 recurring reconciliation defects before production release.

extracurricular: Maintainer of an open source observability plugin used by 400+ GitHub stars.
